title: turritis retrofracta
intro: Turritis retrofracta, also known as the Rock Whitlow-grass, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Turritis retrofracta include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Turritis retrofracta can be prepared as a tincture or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote wound healing and soothe irritated skin.
